repair_plan.repaired_text_preview:
scenario time_on_target_fires
  description "Indirect fires mission with time-on-target coordination — multiple launcher types firing on a single target."
  duration 600 sec
  side red
    display_name "Red"
  end_side
  location artillery_position_1
    kind point
    position 51.53n 0.44e
  end_location
  location mortar_position
    kind point
    position 51.49n 0.37e
  end_location
  location rocket_position
    kind point
    position 51.50n 0.27e
  end_location
  location commander_position
    kind point
    position 51.58n 0.31e
  end_location
  location target_location
    kind point
    position 51.47n 0.35e
  end_location

  network datalink_network WSF_COMM_NETWORK_AD_HOC
  end_network

  platform_type PT_ARTILLERY_LAUNCHER WSF_PLATFORM
    weapon artillery_155mm WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
      launch_computer fires_launch_computer WSF_FIRES_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
        maximum_firing_range 30 km
        minimum_firing_range 3 km
      end_launch_computer
      weapon_effects
        spherical_lethality main_effect WSF_SPHERICAL_LETHALITY
          lethal_radius 50 m
        end_spherical_lethality
      end_weapon_effects
      quantity 1
    end_weapon

    processor sub_task_proc WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
    end_processor

    comm fires_comm WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name datalink_network
      internal_link no
    end_comm
  end_platform_type

  platform_type PT_MORTAR_LAUNCHER WSF_PLATFORM
    weapon mortar_120mm WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
      launch_computer fires_launch_computer WSF_FIRES_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
        maximum_firing_range 8 km
        minimum_firing_range 1 km
      end_launch_computer
      weapon_effects
        spherical_lethality main_effect WSF_SPHERICAL_LETHALITY
          lethal_radius 30 m
        end_spherical_lethality
      end_weapon_effects
      quantity 1
    end_weapon

    processor sub_task_proc WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
    end_processor

    comm fires_comm WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name datalink_network
      internal_link no
    end_comm
  end_platform_type

  platform_type PT_ROCKET_LAUNCHER WSF_PLATFORM
    weapon rocket_122mm WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
      launch_computer fires_launch_computer WSF_FIRES_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
        maximum_firing_range 20 km
        minimum_firing_range 5 km
      end_launch_computer
      weapon_effects
        spherical_lethality main_effect WSF_SPHERICAL_LETHALITY
          lethal_radius 70 m
        end_spherical_lethality
      end_weapon_effects
      quantity 1
    end_weapon

    processor sub_task_proc WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
    end_processor

    comm fires_comm WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name datalink_network
      internal_link no
    end_comm
  end_platform_type

  platform_type PT_FIRES_COMMANDER WSF_PLATFORM
    processor commander_task_proc WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
    end_processor

    comm fires_comm WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name datalink_network
      internal_link no
    end_comm
  end_platform_type

  platform_type PT_TARGET_UNIT WSF_PLATFORM
  end_platform_type

  task artillery_fire
    start_time 270 sec
    fire_at target_unit
  end_task

  task mortar_fire
    start_time 285 sec
    fire_at target_unit
  end_task

  task rocket_fire
    start_time 287 sec
    fire_at target_unit
  end_task

  platform artillery_launcher PT_ARTILLERY_LAUNCHER
    side red
    position 51.53n 0.44e
    add weapon artillery_155mm
    add processor sub_task_proc
    add comm fires_comm
    add task artillery_fire
  end_platform

  platform mortar_launcher PT_MORTAR_LAUNCHER
    side red
    position 51.49n 0.37e
    altitude 0 m agl
    add weapon mortar_120mm
    add processor sub_task_proc
    add comm fires_comm
    add task mortar_fire
  end_platform

  platform rocket_launcher PT_ROCKET_LAUNCHER
    side red
    position 51.50n 0.27e
    add weapon rocket_122mm
    add processor sub_task_proc
    add comm fires_comm
    add task rocket_fire
  end_platform

  platform fires_commander PT_FIRES_COMMANDER
    side red
    position 51.58n 0.31e
    add processor commander_task_proc
    add comm fires_comm
  end_platform

  platform target_unit PT_TARGET_UNIT
    side red
    position 51.47n 0.35e
  end_platform

  event_pipe event_output
end_scenario
end_event_pipe
end_time 600 sec

repaired_text:
scenario time_on_target_fires
  description "Indirect fires mission with time-on-target coordination — multiple launcher types firing on a single target."
  duration 600 sec
  side red
    display_name "Red"
  end_side
  location artillery_position_1
    kind point
    position 51.53n 0.44e
  end_location
  location mortar_position
    kind point
    position 51.49n 0.37e
  end_location
  location rocket_position
    kind point
    position 51.50n 0.27e
  end_location
  location commander_position
    kind point
    position 51.58n 0.31e
  end_location
  location target_location
    kind point
    position 51.47n 0.35e
  end_location

  network datalink_network WSF_COMM_NETWORK_AD_HOC
  end_network

  platform_type PT_ARTILLERY_LAUNCHER WSF_PLATFORM
    weapon artillery_155mm WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
      launch_computer fires_launch_computer WSF_FIRES_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
        maximum_firing_range 30 km
        minimum_firing_range 3 km
      end_launch_computer
      quantity 1
    end_weapon

    processor sub_task_proc WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
    end_processor

    comm fires_comm WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name datalink_network
      internal_link no
    end_comm
  end_platform_type

  platform_type PT_MORTAR_LAUNCHER WSF_PLATFORM
    weapon mortar_120mm WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
      launch_computer fires_launch_computer WSF_FIRES_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
        maximum_firing_range 8 km
        minimum_firing_range 1 km
      end_launch_computer
      quantity 1
    end_weapon

    processor sub_task_proc WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
    end_processor

    comm fires_comm WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name datalink_network
      internal_link no
    end_comm
  end_platform_type

  platform_type PT_ROCKET_LAUNCHER WSF_PLATFORM
    weapon rocket_122mm WSF_IMPLICIT_WEAPON
      launch_computer fires_launch_computer WSF_FIRES_LAUNCH_COMPUTER
        maximum_firing_range 20 km
        minimum_firing_range 5 km
      end_launch_computer
      quantity 1
    end_weapon

    processor sub_task_proc WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
    end_processor

    comm fires_comm WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name datalink_network
      internal_link no
    end_comm
  end_platform_type

  platform_type PT_FIRES_COMMANDER WSF_PLATFORM
    processor commander_task_proc WSF_TASK_PROCESSOR
      script void FireMission()
         WsfPlatform target = WsfSimulation.FindPlatform("target_unit");
         if (!target.IsValid())
            return;
         endif
         WsfTrack targetTrack = target.MakeTrack();
         targetTrack.SetAuxData("IMPACT_TIME", 300.0);

         WsfPlatform launcher;
         string weaponName;
         WsfWeaponTask task;

         launcher = WsfSimulation.FindPlatform("artillery_launcher");
         if (launcher.IsValid())
            weaponName = launcher.WeaponEntry(0).Name();
            task = WsfWeaponTask.Create("TIME_ON_TARGET", weaponName);
            task.SetQuantity(1);
            task.SetCommDevice("fires_comm");
            task.SetAssignee("artillery_launcher");
            AssignTask(targetTrack, task);
         endif

         launcher = WsfSimulation.FindPlatform("mortar_launcher");
         if (launcher.IsValid())
            weaponName = launcher.WeaponEntry(0).Name();
            task = WsfWeaponTask.Create("TIME_ON_TARGET", weaponName);
            task.SetQuantity(1);
            task.SetCommDevice("fires_comm");
            task.SetAssignee("mortar_launcher");
            AssignTask(targetTrack, task);
         endif

         launcher = WsfSimulation.FindPlatform("rocket_launcher");
         if (launcher.IsValid())
            weaponName = launcher.WeaponEntry(0).Name();
            task = WsfWeaponTask.Create("TIME_ON_TARGET", weaponName);
            task.SetQuantity(1);
            task.SetCommDevice("fires_comm");
            task.SetAssignee("rocket_launcher");
            AssignTask(targetTrack, task);
         endif
      end_script

      execute at_time 270 sec absolute
         FireMission();
      end_execute
    end_processor

    comm fires_comm WSF_COMM_TRANSCEIVER
      network_name datalink_network
      internal_link no
    end_comm
  end_platform_type

  platform_type PT_TARGET_UNIT WSF_PLATFORM
  end_platform_type

  platform artillery_launcher PT_ARTILLERY_LAUNCHER
    side red
    position 51.53n 0.44e
    add weapon artillery_155mm
    add processor sub_task_proc
    add comm fires_comm
  end_platform

  platform mortar_launcher PT_MORTAR_LAUNCHER
    side red
    position 51.49n 0.37e
    altitude 0 m agl
    add weapon mortar_120mm
    add processor sub_task_proc
    add comm fires_comm
  end_platform

  platform rocket_launcher PT_ROCKET_LAUNCHER
    side red
    position 51.50n 0.27e
    add weapon rocket_122mm
    add processor sub_task_proc
    add comm fires_comm
  end_platform

  platform fires_commander PT_FIRES_COMMANDER
    side red
    position 51.58n 0.31e
    add processor commander_task_proc
    add comm fires_comm
  end_platform

  platform target_unit PT_TARGET_UNIT
    side red
    position 51.47n 0.35e
  end_platform

  event_pipe event_output
  end_event_pipe

end_time 600 sec
